# Bridge Boundary

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/provideradapteracldocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to adapter ACL](../adapter-acl.md)

`internal/agentbridge/bridge` is the C4 provider-runtime provider-neutral library entrypoint. Callers inject adapter lists and process ports; bridge composes a single provider run.

- Create an adapter registry and reject duplicate/empty provider names.
- Call `Detect(ctx)` and return provider capability snapshots in stable provider-name order.
- Convert `TaskRequest` into `agentbridge.StartRequest` and call adapter `BuildStart`.
- Materialize SaaS assignment `agent_instruction` into provider-specific runtime instruction surfaces.
- Convert `StartCommand` into `process.Command` and start `internal/agentbridge/session`.
- Attach a one-run protocol driver when the adapter implements `ProtocolDriverProvider`.
- Return a session handle facade while preserving adapter `DroppedArgs` and `TempFiles` at the session boundary.

`bridge` does not own scheduling, task claim, EventIngestor append, workdir preparation, policy decision, provider-specific parsing, or persistence.
